title: What Room for Two-Dimensional Gel-Based Proteomics in a Shotgun Proteomics World?
author: Marcus K Lelong C Rabilloud T
content: S-EPMC7563651 PMC7563651 What Room for Two-Dimensional Gel-Based Proteomics in a Shotgun Proteomics World? Two-dimensional gel electrophoresis was instrumental in the birth of proteomics in the late 1980s. However, it is now often considered as an outdated technique for proteomics-a thing
